prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is S-301 Rigging configuration within 2.4 Structural & Ironwork. The relevant subcategory is 2.4.3 Rigging & Machinery Moving. The observed field condition is: sling angle under 30° (tension math - ME). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors ASME B30, OSHA 1926.251. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T1 S-301 Measurement & estimation
